product_boundaries: Readiness workflow only; no compliance certification.
FDA-style sortable export language is allowed, but no FDA endorsement.
No legal advice or automated exemption determination.
Keep the product a lightweight traceability workflow layer, not ERP.

current_state.summary: GSD project initialization is underway/complete and the next safe workflow step is Phase 1 discussion.
current_state.mock_recall_not_found_handlers: Runtime verified in Batch 8 and mapped in .planning/codebase.
current_state.mock_recall_detail_success_shape: Contract-only in Batch 9; no successful runtime/storage flow exists yet.
current_state.phase_1_goal: Maintainers can validate the API contract repeatably and review concrete MockRecallDetail/packet examples before runtime expansion.

next_recommended_actions.action: Then run /gsd plan-phase 1 after discussion context exists.

critical_do_not_expand_without_approval: Database, storage, auth, RBAC, middleware, audit log, route success behavior, generated types, package files, tests, fixtures, imports, exports, CSV generation, UI, supplier portal, OCR, ERP integration, and runtime traceability logic unless covered by the approved phase plan.
